# programs.herdr

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.herdr`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.herdr.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Herdr. |
| `programs.herdr.package` | `null or package` | The herdr package to use. |
| `programs.herdr.settings` | `TOML value` | Configuration written to {file}`$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/herdr/config.toml`. See <https://herdr.dev/docs/configuration/> for the full list of options. |
